Home.title: Welcome to Robert S. Holyoak, DMD, PC

paragraphs.text: Dr. Holyoak strives to provide the highest level of care using advanced technologies while keeping honesty and patient comfort central to every recommendation. We offer comprehensive general, restorative, and cosmetic dentistry tailored to each patient.
Our practice accepts most dental insurance plans and focuses on long-term, conservative care that fits your needs and budget. We aim to make every visit comfortable, respectful, and straightforward.

items.text: A friendly, welcoming office experienced in caring for local patients, especially older adults, with respect and patience.

paragraphs.text: Robert S. Holyoak, DMD, PC was born and raised in Burley, Idaho. He graduated from Brigham Young University and the University of Oregon Dental School (1974) and began practice in 1976. Dr. Holyoak focuses on honest, comfortable, long‑term dental care for adults and seniors and enjoys outdoor life with family when not in the office.

image.alt: Robert S. Holyoak, DMD

paragraphs.text: We provide comprehensive care including preventive, restorative, and cosmetic dentistry. Below are common procedures we perform to keep your mouth healthy and functioning well.

image.alt: Comprehensive dental care and restorative treatment
Porcelain crowns for natural-looking restorations
Custom dentures, removable and implant-supported options

testimonials.author: Susan G.
testimonials.testimonial: “Following a bad experience at another dental office, I was referred to Dr. Holyoak by a dear friend. Not only was Dr. Holyoak very friendly and understanding of my dilemma, but he suggested a couple of options that saved me lots of money and calmed my apprehension. His experience with us ‘retired folks’ is a real treasure. I’ll be back.”

testimonials.author: John B.
testimonials.testimonial: “I called my regular dentist about a bad toothache, but couldn’t be seen for 2 days. My neighbor suggested I see Dr. Holyoak. I called and was seen immediately. Apparently he saves an hour each day for people like me who have pain. Thanks Dr. Holyoak.”

testimonials.author: Jean F.
testimonials.testimonial: “I’d been in Minnesota all summer and called Dr. Holyoak’s office concerning pain in my left jaw near my ear. The receptionist invited me to come down, but my schedule was too full that day. Dr. Holyoak came to the phone and after discussing the symptoms, we decided it could likely be TMJ discomfort... He suggested things I could do until I could see him. His diagnosis was correct and I felt much better when I saw him the next day.”

image.alt: Dr. Holyoak and staff smiling together in the practice reception area

paragraphs.text: Dr. Robert S. Holyoak and his team strive to provide the highest level of care with honesty, integrity, and compassion. We use advanced technologies to support patients’ long-term oral health and accept most dental insurance plans to make care accessible.

“Our sincere and honest approach to dentistry will keep you comfortable before, during and after your visit.” — Dr. Holyoak. The practice emphasizes conservative, patient-first treatment recommendations and a welcoming, long-term relationship with the community.

We focus on comprehensive care for adults and seniors, offering restorative, cosmetic, and preventive services. Our in-house crown and bridge lab allows for personalized restorations crafted with attention to fit and function.
Through experienced clinicians, a long-tenured team, and dependable patient communication, we make thoughtful dental care easy to access for families across the Sun Cities area.

image.alt: Dr. Robert S. Holyoak headshot

paragraphs.text: Robert S. Holyoak, DMD, PC, has served the Sun Cities community since opening his practice in 1976. He provides comprehensive general, restorative, and cosmetic dentistry with particular experience treating adult and senior patients. Dr. Holyoak works closely with an on-site crown and bridge laboratory to provide personalized restorations and long-lasting results.
Patients appreciate his straightforward approach and the continuity of care from a long‑tenured team who know the community and the people they serve.

image.alt: Dr. Robert S. Holyoak smiling

paragraphs.text: Dr. Holyoak completed his undergraduate studies at Brigham Young University in Provo, Utah, and earned his dental degree from the University of Oregon Dental School, graduating in 1974. His formal education laid the foundation for decades of clinical practice and continued learning in restorative and prosthetic dentistry.

image.alt: Brigham Young University emblem

paragraphs.text: Born and raised in Burley, Idaho, Dr. Holyoak values family and the outdoors. He and his wife Jean raised four children, several of whom followed him into dental careers. Outside the office he enjoys packing with his mules, hunting, fishing, skiing, and farming on his acreage. He often says that time with his tractor and animals helps keep life simple and grounded.
Dr. Holyoak’s long history in the community and genuine interest in patients’ lives are reflected in the practice’s friendly atmosphere and the loyalty of staff who have worked with him for decades.

image.alt: Dr. Holyoak with long-tenured team members

Welcoming reception area and check-in desk
Clinical team preparing instruments in operatory
Exterior view of the practice building

paragraphs.heading: Long-Term Care for Our Community
paragraphs.text: We proudly serve the Sun Cities area with consistent, honest dental care. Our long‑tenured team knows many patients across Sun City, Sun City West, Sun City Grand, Surprise, and Peoria, and we focus on steady, dependable care that supports long-term oral health.

image.alt: Smiling family welcomed at Lakeshore Orthodontics front desk

paragraphs.text: Your first visit begins with a complete new patient exam. You’ll meet our team, receive a focused oral exam and any necessary X-rays, and we’ll talk through treatment options that fit your goals.
We’ll review your medical history, explain insurance and payment options, and create a personalized plan so you leave knowing the next steps and timeline for care.

image.alt: Father with daughter at reception of dentist's surgery

paragraphs.text: We work with most major insurance plans and can file claims electronically to simplify your visit.
Affordable payment plans are available and our treatment coordinator will help you find the right option for your budget.

To save time at your appointment, complete new patient forms online or download them from our website. Need help? Call our team at (623) 933-8410 and we’ll guide you through the process or schedule your visit.

image.alt: Patient filling out orthodontic health history forms online
Welcoming dental office ready to schedule your visit

og_meta.title: Get Started | Dr. Holyoak
og_meta.description: Start your visit with Dr. Holyoak. Learn what to expect, complete new patient forms, and schedule your consultation at our Peoria office.

image.alt: Smiling patients of all ages at a modern dental practice

paragraphs.text: Dr. Holyoak offers beautifully crafted, natural-looking dentures. In most cases he recommends implant-supported dentures that won’t slip, fully restoring bite function and helping prevent jawbone atrophy after tooth loss. He will evaluate whether traditional or implant-supported dentures best meet your needs.

image.alt: Smiling family enjoying time together

paragraphs.text: Crowns strengthen weakened teeth, cover large fillings, and restore function. Crowns can also be joined to create bridges that fill gaps from missing teeth. We provide restorations in advanced porcelain and other durable materials that match natural tooth color and sparkle.

image.alt: Modern dentist office interior with advanced technology

paragraphs.text: Veneers are thin porcelain shells that cover the front of teeth to correct cracks, chips, wide spaces and minor imperfections. They deliver a fast cosmetic enhancement, though the treatment requires some enamel removal and does not last as long as porcelain crowns.

image.alt: Two stylish smiling teens taking a selfie

paragraphs.text: Bonding is a conservative alternative to veneers that requires little to no alteration of teeth. Dr. Holyoak sculpts tooth-colored resin to conceal imperfections, reshape teeth, and create a natural-looking result matched to your smile.

image.alt: Young woman smiling while holding an orthodontic retainer

paragraphs.text: Implant restoration replaces lost teeth using titanium posts placed in the jaw. After osseointegration, Dr. Holyoak attaches custom crowns, bridges, or dentures to the implants for stable, natural function and to preserve jaw shape.

image.alt: Patient receiving a dental consultation in a treatment room

paragraphs.text: Routine cleanings are essential for a healthy smile. We recommend scheduling every six months so skilled hygienists can gently remove plaque and tartar, preventing cavities, gum disease, and tooth loss. Typical appointments take about 40 to 50 minutes.

image.alt: Smiling family enjoying time together in a bright dental office

paragraphs.text: Fillings restore teeth after cavity removal. Dr. Holyoak offers several materials, including porcelain and composite fillings that are color-matched for a natural appearance while protecting teeth from further decay.

image.alt: Digital dental equipment and imaging in a treatment room

paragraphs.text: Gum disease is a leading cause of adult tooth loss. Early stages can be treated with deep cleaning, while more advanced disease may require scaling and root planing to remove bacterial pockets and smooth root surfaces to restore gum health.

image.alt: Dental professional using digital scanning equipment during an exam
Welcoming dental office ready to schedule your visit

image.alt: Patient smiling with orthodontic braces in our Emeryville office

paragraphs.text: Find answers to common questions about treatment options, appointment scheduling, and payment plans at Lakeshore Orthodontics.

accordion.header: What orthodontic treatments do you offer?

paragraphs.text: We provide traditional braces for children and adults, clear Invisalign<sup>®</sup> aligners for a more discreet option, and custom retainers to help protect your new smile.

image.alt: Happy family portrait at the orthodontic office

accordion.header: At what age should my child see an orthodontist?

paragraphs.text: The American Association of Orthodontists recommends an initial evaluation by age 7. Early visits let us monitor growth and plan treatment only if and when it will help.

image.alt: Orthodontic practice consultation with a smiling child

accordion.header: How long does treatment usually take?

paragraphs.text: Treatment time depends on the complexity of the case, but many patients finish care in 12 to 24 months. We’ll give you a personalized timeline during your first visit.

image.alt: Orthodontic team planning treatment together

accordion.header: What payment and insurance options are available?

paragraphs.text: We offer flexible monthly payment plans and accept most major dental insurance carriers. Our front desk team will review your coverage and help set up financing if needed.

image.alt: Patient discussing insurance and payment options at the desk

accordion.header: How can I schedule an appointment?

paragraphs.text: Scheduling is easy: call or text us at 519-979-5500 and we’ll find a convenient time that fits your family’s needs.

image.alt: Mother and daughter smiling together in the office
Welcoming dental office ready to schedule your visit
